title: The Mario Head Grand Prix
description:
I was just testing Sony Vegas' features...

Welcome to the Mario Head Grand Prix!
Today we'll see a great race between those 4 Mario Heads:
- Normal Mario Head
- Blue Mario Head
- Green Mario Head
- Yellow Mario head

Who will be the winner of this edition of the GP? Find out there!


DO NOT READ PAST THERE IF YOU HAVEN'T ALREADY SEEN THE VIDEO !

---RESULTS---
1st place: Normal Mario Head (1:29)
2nd place: Green Mario Head (1:30)

Blue Mario Head: crashed at 1:12
Yellow Mario Head: crashed at 0:53

Congratulations to the normal Mario Head!
